title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Everything you need to know about ordering from Yellow Leaf Cafe

items.question: How do I sign up?
items.answer:
1. Visit the registration page
2. Register for an account and follow the prompts
3. Submit proper identification to verify@yellowleaf.club
4. Wait for approval (usually within 24 hours)
5. Once approved, you'll receive 500 bonus points ($25) credit!

items.question: How do I place an order? ($100 Minimum Order)
items.answer:
1. Fill out our simple registration form
2. Browse our premium selection and add items to your cart
3. Check out and pay using Credit Card, Bitcoin, or Interac e-Transfer
4. You'll receive a tracking number once payment is confirmed
5. Expect your shipment within 2-5 business days

items.question: Are there free gifts?
items.answer: Free gifts are available for orders of $150 and above. Any free gift options must be added at the time of order. Free gifts will not be sent separately — please ensure you choose your free gifts upon checkout.

items.question: Is my package shipped safely and discreetly?
items.answer: Yes! We ensure your order is packaged with care and vacuum-sealed. This protects your purchase and your privacy. We use mailers which are secure and discreet. All orders come with a tracking link.

items.question: Do you issue refunds or exchanges?
items.answer: We do not issue cash refunds or exchanges. If you have a defective product, contact us with a picture or video within 48 hours of receiving your order. We only issue refunds in the form of points (store credit). Claims not supported by video may be denied.

items.question: Can I contact a customer representative?
items.answer: Yes! Contact us via live chat on our website, Facebook Messenger, or Instagram. Live chat hours: 9am-5pm PST, Monday to Friday. Email us 24/7 at support@yellowleaf.club.

items.question: Can I order outside of Canada?
items.answer: Unfortunately, we can only ship within Canada at this time.

items.question: When will my order ship?
items.answer: If we receive your order and payment by our 9am PST cutoff, your order ships the same business day. Payments received after 9am PST will be shipped the next business day.

items.question: Why isn't my tracking number working?
items.answer: We may email the tracking number before the package arrives at the Post Office. It won't show up on Canada Post until physically scanned. In most cases, trackers update by end of business day. If not delivered within 5 business days, contact us for a trace.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept Interac e-Transfer, Credit Cards, and Bitcoin. Payment details are included in the invoice emailed after placing your order.

items.question: Can I edit or cancel my order?
items.answer: To edit or add items, you'll need to create a new order. Email us at info@yellowleaf.club with your order number to cancel the old one (if not yet paid).

items.question: How does the referral program work?
items.answer: Share your referral URL from your account panel. When your friend registers and gets approved, they earn 500 points ($25). After their first purchase, you get a $25 coupon voucher by email!
